sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ جُزْءًا مِنَ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ الْآنَ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni se danas smatraju dijelom našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones are considered a part of our daily life now.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَسْتَخْدِمُهَا لِلاتِّصَالِ بِالْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَتَصَفُّحِ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ih za pozivanje prijatelja i pretraživanje interneta.
sentences.translationEn: We use them to call friends and browse the internet.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تُسَاعِدُنَا فِي التَّعَلُّمِ وَالْعَمَلِ مِنْ أَيِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Oni nam pomažu u učenju i radu s bilo kojeg mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: They help us in learning and working from anywhere.
